title: Monitoring Quantum Applications
description: Learn to implement comprehensive monitoring for quantum applications, including quantum-specific metrics like fidelity, circuit depth, and hardware utilization. Set up dashboards, alerts, and observability infrastructure for production quantum services.
learningObjectives: Define and collect quantum-specific metrics beyond traditional application monitoring
Implement Prometheus metrics exporters for quantum applications
Create Grafana dashboards that visualize quantum execution quality
Set up alerting rules for quantum service degradation
Monitor quantum hardware availability and queue status
Implement custom metrics for variational algorithm convergence
